member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for and to abstract away reading and writing exact bytes of some classes/structs.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.Write(System.IO.BinaryWriter,WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Message)
member.summary: Writes a to the steam and advances stream position. Does not distinguish and does not write it to the stream.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.WriteBufferWithLength(System.IO.BinaryWriter,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes the buffer's as , then the buffer itself and also advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.ReadBufferWithLength(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads as then the reads a buffer of that length. Advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.WriteUtf8WithLength(System.IO.BinaryWriter,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a string as a utf8 buffer using and advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.ReadUtf8WithLength(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads an integer byte length and then the utf8 string of that length using Advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.Write(System.IO.BinaryWriter,WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo)
member.summary: Writes a in a format can understand and advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.ReadVoiceInfo(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a that was written by and advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.Write(System.IO.BinaryWriter,WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo[])
member.summary: Writes an array of s in a format can understand and advances stream position.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.BinaryReadWriteExtensions.ReadVoiceInfoArray(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads an array of s that was written by and advances stream position.

member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Message
member.summary: Base class for all structures passed during communication.

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Message.IsRequest
member.summary: Wether this message is a request or a responce. Affects what means.

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Message.MessageType
member.summary: The identification of this request/responce object.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Message.WriteContents(System.IO.BinaryWriter)
member.summary: Writes the contents (payload) of this object using a borrowed writer, so that this object can be reconstructed using of the current class.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Message.ReadContents(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads the contents (payload) using a borrowed reader into this object, i.e. reconstructs this object from data written using of the current class.

member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Request
member.summary: Base class for all request messages passed during communication.

member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Response
member.summary: Base class for all responce messages passed during communication.

member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.RequestMapper
member.summary: Maps incoming requsts to registed delegates.
member.remarks: Each has a under which is to be written to the stream first. That is read to then construct a particular decendant and call a delegate corresponding to it.

member.name: E:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.RequestMapper.OnRequestReadStart
member.summary: Invoked when the has been read. The rest of the request is read imedeatly after.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.RequestMapper.HandleSingleRequest(System.IO.BinaryReader,System.IO.BinaryWriter)
member.summary: Reads one request from the input stream and writes one response to the output stream. Borrows the reader and a writer. Does not flush the writer.

member.name: F:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.RequestMapper.registeredReaderWithHandler
member.summary: A storage of all readers with handlers. Each delegate here reads the stream to construct a > object, invokes the inner registerd handler and returns a response.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.RequestMapper.Register``1(System.Func{``0,WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.Messages.Response})
member.summary: Register a handler for a particular type of .

member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.ResponseReader
member.summary: Reads incoming responses as objects.
member.remarks: Each has a under which is to be written to the stream first. That is read to pick a particular decendant and construct and fill.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.ResponseReader.Register``1
member.summary: Registers a type so that a of that type can be read by this reader.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.ResponseReader.RegisterAll
member.summary: Runs for each standard type (subclass) of .

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.ResponseReader.CreateWithStanardRegistered
member.summary: Creates a with having been called.

member.name: M:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.ResponseReader.ReadResponse(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Reads a single from the borrowed stream. Throws if is not recognized.
member.exception: No registerd type has a matching .

member.name: T:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo
member.summary: Information about a voice (synthesis engine) installed on the system.

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo.Id
member.summary: The unique id of the synthesis engine (voice).

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo.Name
member.summary: The display name of the synthesis engine (voice).

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo.Language
member.summary: The BCP-47 language tag of the synthesis engine (voice).

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo.Gender
member.summary: The gender of the synthesis engine (voice).

member.name: P:WinRTSpeechSynthServer.Protocol.VoiceInfo.Empty
member.summary: Empty voice to be used as place holder.
